final:
// // This module decrements its value on each positive clock edge and wraps around from 0 to 3.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 2'b0;
        end
        else begin
            if (count == 2'b11) begin
                count <= 2'b0;
            end
            else begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements its value on each positive clock edge and wraps around from 0 to 3.
